title: Combat Expansion (Dual Wielding)
description: Expanding upon Minecraft Combat to make the Minecraft PvP & PvE experience better!
body:
# REVAMP COMING SOON

## This plugin is archived until further notice. Do not worry, we are not abandoning this plugin!

Combat Expansion takes Minecraft combat to the next level with an array of exciting features designed to make PVP and PVE interactions more dynamic and strategic. Whether you're looking for enhanced mechanics, custom effects, or immersive gameplay, Combat Expansion delivers everything you need for a thrilling PvP environment. 

# Features

## ⚔️ Dual-Wielding Combat
Fully functional off-hand attacks with customizable cooldowns and scaling damage.
Smooth integration with attack speed mechanics, perfectly synced with visual animations.

## Expanded Protection Enchantments
The Protection enchantment has been fully expanded all the way up to level 7.

### Coming in Later Versions:
Combo Chains

Throwable Weapons

Super Attacks

Parrying

Config File

**A Plugin Developed by BlockForge Studios**

[Join Our Discord Server](https://discord.gg/jQGMhKA5m6)

**Requires [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)**



Note: this plugin is currently in beta, so don't expect it to be perfect yet, things may change in future versions.
